channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed
item.description: The latest app from the team behind Bluesky is Attie, an AI assistant that lets you build your own algorithm. At the Atmosphere conference, Bluesky's former CEO, Jay Graber, and CTO Paul Frazee, unveiled Attie, which is powered by Anthropic's Claude and built on top of Bluesky's underlying AT Protocol (atproto). Attie allows users to […]

item.title: 'Weekend work increased more than 40%': How AI is quietly expanding the work week as Saturday starts shift to 7:11 am
item.description: AI is increasing workplace intensity, weekend activity, and multitasking while focus time drops, and organizational alignment struggles to keep pace.

item.title: The Pixel 10a doesn’t have a camera bump, and it’s great
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a can lay flat on a table, but otherwise the company hasn't brought a ton of upgrades to its newest budget smartphone.

item.title: YouTube CEO says the best YouTubers will ‘never leave their home’
item.description: CEO Neal Mohan insisted that he isn’t worried about Netflix luring away YouTube's most popular creators.

item.title: Samsung has a massive TV sale to celebrate the Final Four — here are 9 TVs that I'd spend my own money on
item.description: Samsung has a massive sale on its best-rated TVs to celebrate the Final Four, and I've rounded up the 9 best deals that I'd spend my own money on.
